title: Create item in another board automation and location column not copying
excerpt: When I try to create an item via automation from 1 board to a second board, location columns on the source board don’t appear to be supported to copy to the second board.  Am I missing something or is there a workaround …

posts.author: julDH14 (Julie H)
posts.cookedHtml: When I try to create an item via automation from 1 board to a second board, location columns on the source board don’t appear to be supported to copy to the second board. Am I missing something or is there a workaround for this limitation?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Which product (CRM/Work Management, etc) and level (Pro/Enterprise) do you have?

posts.author: julDH14 (Julie H)
posts.cookedHtml: We are on the Pro version of Monday.com.
